response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems design, with most of their work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web/mobile/GIS contexts; there is no evidence of leadership in cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers, and their C++ exposure appears limited to academic or minor projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven experience in open-source project leadership and mentorship
Demonstrated ability to build and deploy scalable systems (Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
